name: get_conversation_messages
description: Retrieve the full message history for a specific conversation. Returns all messages exchanged between the visitor and operators.

parameters.name: website_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier for your Crisp website.

parameters.name: session_id
parameters.description: The session identifier for the conversation.

parameters.name: timestamp_before
parameters.description: Fetch messages before this Unix timestamp in milliseconds. Used for pagination.

data.content: Hi, I have a question about my account.
Sure, I'd be happy to help!
